description: Articles matching these keywords (case-insensitive) in the title are excluded from the podcast. Includes political content and all sports coverage — even local sports stories are excluded per editorial policy.

bad_news_filter.description: Articles matching these phrases in the title are removed unless the article scores at least theme_relevance_threshold keyword-word-points for today's theme — meaning the bad event is fundamentally about the theme topic (e.g. a fatal tractor accident on Working Lands day, or digital polling errors on Cariboo Local Affairs day).

email_subject_blocklist.description: Emails whose subject starts with one of these words/phrases (case-insensitive) are skipped at ingest. Used to filter test emails sent to verify the address works.

email_sender_blocklist.description: Emails from these sender domains or matching these from-address patterns are rejected at ingest, regardless of keyword score.
